title: American Banker Article: X9 QR Code Standard To Accelerate Pay-By-Bank
excerpt: QR Codes have transformed payments at scale in places like India, China, and Brazil. American Banker recently spotlighted the new X9 Payment QR Code standard.
body:
QR Codes have transformed payments at scale in places like India, China, and Brazil. *American Banker* recently spotlighted the new X9 Payment QR Code standard being created, which is bringing that proven model to the U.S. with a secure, standardized approach. The article also highlights how Matera and Payfinia demonstrated the payment of an invoice instantly by scanning a payment QR Code — an experience created in accordance with the draft X9 standard.

Read the full article on [American Banker](https://www.americanbanker.com/payments/news/how-qr-codes-can-boost-instant-payment).
